title: Allahabad University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Allahabad University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Allahabad University Result 2026 Out for MA Urdu 1st Semester and MA English 3rd Semester on the official website - coe.allduniv.ac.in on 21-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Allahabad University result.

content.text: Allahabad University Result 2026 has been officially released for Postgraduate courses including MA Urdu 1st Semester and MA English 3rd Semester examinations for the academic session 2025-26.

Allahabad University Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://coe.allduniv.ac.in/. Students who appeared for these PG semester exams can check and download their results through the official portal using their login credentials such as roll number or enrollment number.
Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in their results. In case of any discrepancy, they should immediately contact the university authorities for correction.

Allahabad University has published MA Urdu 1st semester and MA English 3rd semester results for the 2025-26 session on its official website. Students can access their PG semester results online using their credentials. The result links are now active for quick access.

Allahabad University has activated the direct link to check PG semester results including MA Urdu and MA English courses. Students can view and download their results online using the official result portal link provided below.

sections.heading: How to Download Allahabad University Result 2026

items: Open the relevant result link for your course
Enter your roll number or required credentials
Submit the details to view your result
Download and print the result for future reference
